overview: Cyclops is a Boss-class Humanoid/Beast monster found in Goblin Cave. 2 grades: Common, Elite. Base stats (Common): 4136 HP, 88 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed -200. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 14 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Stomp at 220% ratio (1936 base damage). Sight range 1500, behavior tree: BT_Cyclops. Elite gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Petrification.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 11 melee attacks. Combo1 (110%), Combo1From2 (110%), Combo1From3 (110%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Blinker
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Blinker icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Petrification
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Petrification icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Slow
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Slow icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Light (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire, Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500), Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 300
strategies.description: Has 300 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Stomp (220% ratio)
strategies.description: Stomp deals 1936 damage at base (220% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Elite Gains: Petrification
strategies.description: Elite grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Petrification. These change the fight dynamics in Elite.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1500 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1500 units, loses target at 4000 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: HP Phase Triggers
strategies.description: Blackboard HPRatio Initial Value: 66%, Blackboard HPRatio Subtract Value: 33%. These HP thresholds trigger phase transitions, summons, or special attacks.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1500 units. Loses target at 4000 units.
